title: Basic Knife Skills
description: Learn how to properly hold a knife, basic cutting techniques, and safety tips.

steps.instruction: Hold the knife with a firm grip, using your dominant hand.
Use your other hand to guide the food, keeping fingers curled under for safety.
Practice chopping vegetables like onions and carrots in a safe manner.

safety_tips: Always cut away from your body.
Keep your knife sharp to prevent slipping.
Never leave a knife unattended on a counter.
